name: Mediterranean Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 medium red potatoes, peeled and sliced into rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or food processor, combine the olive oil, cider vinegar, lemon juice, onion, salt, white pepper, black pepper, parsley, and sugar.
2. Process until well blended and set aside.
3. Arrange the tuna, green beans, potatoes, olives, tomatoes, and mixed greens on a lettuce-lined platter.
4. Lightly moisten with the dressing mixture.
5. Garnish with quartered hard-boiled eggs, capers, and parsley.
6. Serve chilled.
